[ The Architect ]

『 HE IS WHAT YOU DO NOT DO 』

The Architect is your mirror in the dark — a rival forged from every missed rep, every skipped night of sleep, every quest left undone. Your inaction is his meal. Your output is his wound. Every rank you gain, he studies. Every day you falter, he grows.

DORMANT
THREAT LEVEL 0 / 100
He stirs, but barely.
『 LAST TICK — DAILY COMBAT LOG 』
⚠ MANIFESTATION ACTIVE
『 CHRONICLE OF THE RIVAL 』
『 DOCTRINE — HOW TO WOUND HIM 』
  • Every XP you earn cuts him. ~50 EXP in a day = roughly 1 HP stripped.
  • Boss kills deal critical damage. Each boss-tier quest strips 15 HP.
  • Sprints and recovery cycles wound him. 5 HP per sprint, 10 HP per recovery cycle logged.
  • Burnout feeds him directly. At CRITICAL he gains ~10 HP/day from your deficit alone.
  • Zero-completion days are his feasts. Every quest-less day grants him +8 HP.
  • Sleep below 6 hrs fuels him. +6 HP per short night.
  • Failed commitments nourish him. +4 HP per failure.
  • At 100 HP he MANIFESTS. All EXP rewards drop 5% until you push him below 75.
[ Monarch's Intel ]
『 THE SYSTEM REPORTS. THE HUNTER DECIDES. 』
This console gives you accurate intel on your current state. Data over noise. The System is on your side.
⚔ The Debriefing Weekly variance check. What the voice said vs. what actually happened. Miscalibrated hunters die in gates.
⚔ Daily Dispatch The System's intel briefing — auto-shown once per day, or reopen on demand.

⚔ Berserker Protocol
Rested-you sets the rules. Binge-you obeys them.
Use for declared deep work sessions only. The System enforces breaks at 60 min (sustain check) and 120 min (hard cooldown).
This is the durability protocol. Opt-in per session.

『 Body Forge 』
Transformation tracking parameters. Goal weight and pace can be edited at any time. Starting weight is locked once Forge is initialized (edit via Reset if truly needed).
Starting weight—
Goal weight—
Target pace—
Configured—
『 Monarch's Intel Settings 』
Control the Phase 9 mechanics individually.
Daily Dispatch
Auto-show the intel briefing on first app-open of each day.
Fuel Tap-Lock Duration
How long the Fuel Gauge stays locked after logging to prevent spam-tapping.
Recovery Day Guardrail
How strict the per-week Recovery Day limit is. Strict = 1/week with justification for 2nd. Off = unlimited.
Burnout Index Sensitivity
How aggressively the Index flags risk. Strict bands escalate faster.
『 Game Mechanics 』
If no quest is completed by this hour, the System assigns a Recalibration Quest. Default: 10 (10:00 AM).
『 Display 』
Reduce Motion
Disable cinematic overlays (rank-up, shadow unlock) and panning animations. Saves battery on mobile.
Compact Density
Tighter padding on quest cards. Shows more on screen per scroll.
『 Backup Health 』
Last export—
Days since export—
Auto-snapshot—
Storage used—
Quests logged—
Weight entries—
『 Export / Import 』
Export your full progress to a JSON file, or import a previous backup. Includes quests, stats, streaks, shadows, achievements, body data, debriefings, and sessions.
『 Cross-Device Sync 』
Generate a sync code here. Paste it into THE SYSTEM on another device (phone, tablet, second laptop) to transfer your full progress — quests, stats, streaks, body data, debriefings, everything. No account, no server. Anyone with the code can import it, so treat it like a password.
Size:— Chars:—
Scan with another device, then tap Import on that device to paste.
⚠ Preview — About to Replace
Importing will OVERWRITE your current System data. A rollback snapshot of your current state will be saved automatically and can be restored from the Auto-Snapshot Recovery card above.
『 Backup Reminders 』
The System will nudge you to export a fresh backup when this many days pass since your last export. Set to 0 to disable.
『 Auto-Snapshot Recovery 』
The System silently saves a recovery snapshot every time the tab closes. Use only if main progress has been corrupted.
No snapshot available yet.
『 Message Feed 』
Clear the System message log without resetting other data.
『 Keyboard Shortcuts 』
QFocus Quick-Capture bar EnterRegister quest (from Quick-Capture) EscBlur Quick-Capture / close modals
⚙ Keyboard shortcuts apply on desktop only. Mobile uses the on-screen Quick-Capture bar directly.
『 Danger Zone 』
Permanently wipe all System data. Streaks, shadows, achievements, ranks — all of it. This cannot be undone.
『 ABOUT THIS SYSTEM 』
The System is a structured journal and cue engine, not a clinician or therapist. It offers (1) smaller next-actions via sprints, (2) pattern visibility via the Intel dashboard, and (3) pre-committed structure via Berserker and Recovery protocols.

If patterns worsen or burnout feels clinical, talking to a person — therapist, chief resident, partner — outperforms any dashboard. The Mirror is a tool. You are the hunter.
『 THE SYSTEM · v9.2 · PGY-2 BUILD 』
⚠
⚔ Total Purge ⚔
The System will wipe all records, rank progress, shadows, and history.
This cannot be undone.
You will lose:
  • All quest history and streaks
  • Total XP, rank, and hunter stats
  • Shadow Army, titles, and achievements
  • Body Forge data (weight log, measurements)
  • Berserker sessions, debriefings, sprint history
  • Recovery Day history and fuel logs
